<div align="center">
  <h2>Know About Me</h2>
</div>

<img src="https://i.postimg.cc/wj3jSKVc/52c113261b11744f4723bd107c4c40d7-removebg-preview.png" width="210" align="left" style="margin-right: 15px;">

<div align="justify">
  <h3>Hey there! I'm Aditya</h3>
  I’m a Full Stack Developer by profession and a Web3 enthusiast by mild obsession. By day, I build scalable apps and pretend my console logs are intentional. By night, I dive into smart contracts, decentralization rabbit holes, and occasionally question if gas fees are a social experiment.
  If it runs on the web, talks to a blockchain, or thinks for itself, I probably want to build it.
  <br><br>
  
  <hr style="border: 1px solid #333; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
  
  <img src="https://i.postimg.cc/dVkFKpH4/1000021660-removebg-preview.png" width="170" align="right" style="margin-left: 15px;">
  
  <h3>Top Projects (built to avoid manual labor)</h3>
  <a href="https://github.comVulture-avs/BOLT-the-web-builder"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/BOLT-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>&nbsp; gracefully.<br>
  <a href="https://github.com/Vulture-avs/SAFE_SENSE"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/SAFE_SENSE-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>&nbsp; An AI Fall Detection System<br>

<br>

> Code is never finished. It only becomes slightly less terrible over time.

> Every commit I make is essentially just a small, desperate apology to my future self. Someday I will return to this codebase, look at the spaghetti I've written, and wonder who let me anywhere near a keyboard.
